name: Pathfinder 2e (Golarion)
note: Public default theme. Each language is labeled by its full name; the file is themes/pathfinder/<name>.json. The code is the ISO key Foundry's game.i18n.lang reports - the loader maps it to the full-name file. Deity proper names stay canonical across languages; only descriptions are localized (Ukrainian transliterates the names). Resolution: player's language, then baseLanguage, then the die id.
